titleStmt.title: SII 34.107: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 107. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: The beginning portion relating to the ruling king and date is lost. Most probably the king was Rājarāja I. This records that the sabhā of the village assigned some dēvadāna land for offerings to Piḷḷaiyār Kshētrapāladēva in the temple on the hill in Śrīkaṇṭha-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Mīkōḻai-nāḍu in Paṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu. The transaction took place under the orders (niyōga) of the nāḍu-vagai officer of the locality.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
teṉkaraip pāṇṭi kulācani vaḷanāṭṭu mīkōḻai
brahmadeyam śrīkaṇṭaccaruppEti maṅkalattupperuṅ
kuṟi sabhaiyōm Eṅkaḷ tiruveṟumpiyūr malaiyāṇṭār śrīkōyi
lilē peruṅkuṟi kūṭṭakku
ṟaivarakkūṭi
yiruntu I
ttēvar kōyil na
m piḷḷaiyār kṣē
trapāla devarkku
tiruvamutu cey
taruḷa san=tikku
tiruvamutarici Irunā
ḻiyāka canti mūṉṟu
kkum tiruvamutarici
nāḻikku ne
lluk kuṟuṇiyē
ḻu nāḻiyum kariya
mutukku canti 1 kku
nellu Uriyāka canti mū
ṉṟukku nellu nāṭuriyu
m neyamutu pōtu Araip
piṭiyāka canti mūṉṟukku ne
yamutorupiṭi yaraikku 3 mu
ṉṉāḻiyum tayiramutu canti 1
uḻakkāka canti mūṉṟukku tayiramutu
muḻākkukku 2 nāṭuriyum ca
nti Oṉṟukku Aṭaikkāya
mutiraṇṭākac canti mūṉṟukku
Aṭaikkāyamutāṟum Ilai
yamutirupattu nālukkumā
ka 2 nāḻiyāka nāḷoṉṟu
kku 2 10 m ṟu nāḻiyāka
Āṉa Eṇpattiru
kalaṉē tūṇip
m santiviḷakku
mūṉṟu santiyum
viḷakkerikka kaṭavārkaḷā
kavum vaitta nilam I
ttēvar paḻantēva
r paḻan tēvatāṉam Ivū
rakavāy Irupattiraṇṭā
ṅkaṇṇāṟṟu m catira
ttu Aiñcām pāṭakamā
ṟumāvil vaṭakkaṭaiya
mūṉṟumāvu mikku
ṇa Āṟāmpāṭa
kam nilam māvu ma
ṟu vēlip potu viṇa
viḷākattukku mēṟku ma
rumoḻitēvaṉ karaikku
vaṭakkuṅ kiḻakkun tiruve
ṇ vailuṭaiyār nilat
tukkut teṟkum
lamorumāvarai
yumāna nila m
yaraimāvuṅ ko
ṇṭu Iṉṉivantam
candrādittavaṟ ce
llakkaṭavatā
ka Iṉṉāṭu vakaice
ykiṉṟa paṇimakaṉ
kṣatriya śikhāmaṇi vaḷa
nāṭṭup paṉaiyūr nāṭṭu
c cuntaracōḻa nallūrc cu
ntaracōḻa nalluruṭaiyā
ṉ nallūraṭikaḷāma
lar niyōkappaṭi śi
lālekhai ceyvittu
kkuṭuttēṉ peruṅkuṟi
sabhaiyO maṇam
māpayaṭṭi krama
vittaṉ paṇiyālu
m valavūr māppāṉi
Digital edition of SII 34.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
